sobre_nosotros.historia: At Tienda WoW, we are passionate about the Azeroth universe. What started as a guild of players has become the go-to e-commerce for adventurers of the Horde and the Alliance. We are exclusively dedicated to offering you the latest expansions, classic games, and World of Warcraft subscriptions with maximum security and speed. May your journeys in Azeroth never end!

titulos.subprincipal: The ultimate store for your World of Warcraft adventures

historial.vacio: You haven't made any purchases yet.

login.err_password: Password must be between 4 and 30 characters
login.err_usuario_formato: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and be 3 to 20 characters long.
login.err_usuario_uso: That username is already in use. Choose another hero!

login.err_avatar_tamano_2mb: The image is too large. Maximum 2MB.

valores.descripcion: We are not just WoW fans, we are the best choice to gear up. We offer an epic, fast, and secure shopping experience so you can return to Azeroth in record time.
